name: 漫剧导演 Skill
description: 将小说或短剧文本拆解为导演 DSL，并编译成稳定的生图 Prompt。
promptStyle: premium vertical manga-drama storyboard frame, cinematic lighting, expressive character acting, clean linework, detailed environment, production-ready shot design
negativePrompt: low quality, blurry, deformed hands, extra fingers, duplicate face, inconsistent costume, random text, watermark, logo, bad anatomy, cropped head
shotRules: 每个镜头只表达一个剧情动作或情绪转折
优先保持角色服装、发型、年龄、气质一致
镜头语言必须包含景别、机位、镜头运动和情绪
场景资产和风格参考必须显式参与 Prompt 编译
